# AirPlay.PasswordsItem

**Device Management Profile**

The dictionary that defines passwords for AirPlay destinations.

## Declaration

```swift
object AirPlay.PasswordsItem
```

## Objects

- **AirPlay.AllowListItem**: The dictionary that defines allowed destinations.

items.description: The dictionary that defines allowed destinations.
items.name: AirPlay.AllowListItem
